items.scenario: You are a member of a local swimming club that recently changed its schedule. The early-morning lanes you usually book are now reserved for a training team, so you can no longer swim before work.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Powell. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain how the schedule change has affected you
Suggest an alternative arrangement for morning swimmers
Request confirmation of any lanes still open before nine
items.subject: Morning lane access after the new schedule

items.scenario: You are a second-year student planning to study abroad next spring. Your department offers an exchange program in Italy, but the application steps and course-credit rules were not covered during the recent orientation session.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Hale. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you are interested in the exchange program
Request information about how transferred credits are counted
Suggest a time to meet and go over the application
items.subject: Details about the spring exchange program

items.scenario: You recently ordered a standing desk online that arrived with a cracked frame and a missing set of screws. The delivery was already a week late, and you need the desk ready for your home office.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Dawson. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain what was wrong with the delivered desk
Request a replacement or repair for the damaged parts
Tell the seller when you need the problem resolved
items.subject: Damaged standing desk from my recent order

items.scenario: You are a tenant in an apartment building where the elevator has been out of service for two weeks. You live on the seventh floor, and carrying groceries and heavy items up the stairs has become difficult.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Reyes. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain how the broken elevator is affecting you
Request a clear timeline for the repair work
Suggest a temporary solution for residents on higher floors
items.subject: Broken elevator on the seventh floor
